content: Triphthongs are now commonly perceived as ________, thus, treated as having _______ syllables.
options: A. two phonemes consisting of a diphthong + monophthong; two
B. two phonemes consisting of a monophthong + schwa; three
D. two phonemes consisting of a diphthong + schwa; two

content: A lingua franca is always an official language of the countries where it is used.
Both broad transcription and narrow transcription are used to transcribe or document utterances in ordinary English learning.
__________ consonants are consonants which form the nucleus of a syllable that does not contain a vowel.
Which of the following is an open-syllable word?
